en_title: Sony Knew Killing Discs Would Be 'An Enormous PR Issue' and Had 'Strictest' Guidelines to Gag Staff From Commenting on Controversy, Former God of War Dev Claims
cn_title: 前《战神》开发者：索尼早知停产实体盘将引发巨大公关危机
subtitle: 最严格社媒禁令

paragraphs.en: Sony knew its decision to kill PlayStation 5 discs would spark outrage, and reportedly issued staff with the "strictest" social media guidelines to stop them from publicly commenting on the controversy.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼知道停产PlayStation 5实体游戏光盘的决定会激起众怒，据称还向员工下达了「最严格」的社交媒体规范，禁止他们公开评论这场争议。

paragraphs.en: That's according to God of War Laufey writer Alanah Pearce, who alleged in a new YouTube video that the restrictions were the most stringent that PlayStation staff had seen — as Sony anticipated its announcement to cause significant blowback.
paragraphs.cn: 这一说法来自《战神：劳菲》编剧Alanah Pearce。她在一段新的YouTube视频中称，由于索尼预料这项公告会招致强烈反弹，这些限制是PlayStation员工见过最严厉的一次。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this month, Sony stunned fans by announcing that it would stop launching PlayStation 5 games on physical discs from January 2026 onwards . While the move follows a gradual shift in video game sales from boxed copies to digital downloads over the past decade, gamers who prefer to own a physical edition, or who are concerned by the impact this will have on game preservation, have been vocal in their opposition.
paragraphs.cn: 本月早些时候，索尼宣布从2026年1月起不再以实体光盘形式推出PlayStation 5游戏，令粉丝震惊。过去十年，电子游戏销售确实逐渐从盒装实体版转向数字下载，但偏好拥有实体版本，或担忧此举会影响游戏保存的玩家仍公开表达了反对。

paragraphs.en: Sony's rationale for ditching discs is that it's simply following consumer trends. "In response to shifting trends in consumer preference, new games will be released on PlayStation Store and at retailers in digital formats only," Sid Shuman, Senior Director, Sony Interactive Entertainment Content Communications, said in a post on PlayStation Blog .
paragraphs.cn: 索尼放弃光盘的理由是顺应消费者趋势。索尼互动娱乐内容传播高级总监Sid Shuman在PlayStation Blog发文称：「为响应消费者偏好的变化趋势，新游戏将仅以数字形式在PlayStation Store和零售商处发行。」

paragraphs.en: "As consumer preferences and the broader entertainment industry continue to shift away from physical discs to digital, physical game disc production for all new games releasing on PlayStation consoles will be discontinued starting January 2028. Following this date, new games will be available on PlayStation Store and at retailers in digital formats only. This transition has no impact on games that already released, or will be releasing, prior to January 2028 in disc format.
paragraphs.cn: 「随着消费者偏好和更广泛的娱乐行业继续从实体光盘转向数字形式，自2028年1月起，所有在PlayStation主机上发行的新游戏都将停止生产实体游戏光盘。此后，新游戏将仅以数字形式在PlayStation Store和零售商处提供。这项转变不会影响已经发行，或将在2028年1月之前以光盘形式发行的游戏。」

paragraphs.en: "This is a natural direction for Sony Interactive Entertainment to adapt to consumer trends as the general preference for digital media significantly outpaces physical discs. This transition will enable us to align more closely with how most of our community prefers to access and play games today."
paragraphs.cn: 「由于人们对数字媒体的整体偏好已大幅超过实体光盘，这是索尼互动娱乐适应消费者趋势的自然方向。这项转变将让我们更贴近当今大多数社区成员获取和游玩游戏的方式。」

paragraphs.en: Despite a high-profile petition and a constant stream of comments on Sony's subsequent livestreams and social media posts — even overshadowing the release of new games that have nothing to do with the controversy — there's been no sign that the PlayStation maker will change its mind. For now, Sony simply hasn't commented further — and is unlikely to do so, Pearce suggested.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管一份备受关注的请愿书持续发酵，索尼此后的直播和社交媒体帖子下也不断涌现相关评论，甚至盖过了与争议无关的新游戏发布，但没有迹象表明这家PlayStation制造商会改变主意。Pearce表示，索尼目前只是没有进一步置评，而且很可能不会回应。

paragraphs.en: "Sony already knew everyone would be pissed off," Pearce began. "They knew this. People working at PlayStation first-party studios told me that Sony had the strictest social media guidelines for this particular thing that they've ever seen issued.
paragraphs.cn: Pearce说道：「索尼早就知道所有人都会非常生气。他们知道这一点。在PlayStation第一方工作室任职的人告诉我，索尼针对这件事发布了他们见过最严格的社交媒体规范。」

paragraphs.en: "Sony does somewhat regularly tell employees what they can or can't say about certain things," she explained. "I was under a lot of guidelines when I was working on God of War Laufey. I still am, and they did send me guidelines regarding what I could say on the day that the game was announced. But in this instance, it is apparently the strictest the employees I spoke to have sever seen regarding public communications. They would only have done this if they knew it was going to be an enormous PR issue. This is no surprise to them."
paragraphs.cn: 她解释道：「索尼确实会比较定期地告诉员工，某些事情能说什么、不能说什么。我参与《战神：劳菲》时就受到很多规范约束，现在依然如此；游戏公布当天，他们也向我发送了关于哪些内容可以说的指引。但这一次，据我交谈过的员工所说，这是他们在公共沟通方面见过最严格的规定。只有在他们知道这会成为巨大公关问题时才会这么做，所以这对索尼并不意外。」

paragraphs.en: For Sony, going all-digital for new game releases will earn it more money from every sale at a time when console sales are expected to plummet due to their rising costs. For a first-party PlayStation game such as The Last of Us, Sony will only keep around 65% of the money from a physical copy, with around 30% going to the retailer and roughly another 5% on manufacturing costs. Meanwhile, for a physical copy of a third-party game such as the Activision-published Call of Duty, Sony will get a licensing fee, likely around 15%. For digital sales, Sony keeps 100% of first-party game revenue, and a far better cut from third-party titles.
paragraphs.cn: 在主机成本上涨、销量预计将大幅下滑之际，新游戏全面数字化能让索尼从每笔销售中赚取更多收入。以《最后生还者》等PlayStation第一方游戏为例，实体版收入中索尼只能保留约65%，约30%归零售商，另有约5%用于制造成本。对于动视发行的《使命召唤》等第三方游戏实体版，索尼获得的授权费可能约为15%。数字销售方面，索尼可保留第一方游戏100%的收入，并从第三方作品中获得高得多的分成。

paragraphs.en: More than 335,000 people have now signed the Change.org petition calling on Sony to U-turn on its decision, though Pearce said that this would not prompt Sony to change its mind. Speaking to IGN, analysts have all said similar . Dr. Serkan Toto, CEO of Japanese game industry consultancy firm Kantan Games, suggested that even if half a million people cancelled their PlayStation Plus subscription in protest, it would be just a drop in the ocean for Sony.
paragraphs.cn: 目前已有超过33.5万人签署Change.org请愿书，要求索尼撤回决定，但Pearce表示这不会促使索尼改变主意。接受IGN采访的分析师也都表达了类似看法。日本游戏产业咨询公司Kantan Games首席执行官Serkan Toto博士表示，即使有50万人为抗议而取消PlayStation Plus订阅，对索尼而言也只是沧海一粟。

paragraphs.en: "I sympathize with physical media fans, but Sony will not reverse this decision," Toto told IGN. "They of course knew what the online reaction would look like, and they now wait for this storm to pass.
paragraphs.cn: Toto告诉IGN：「我同情实体媒介爱好者，但索尼不会撤销这项决定。他们当然早已知道网络反应会是什么样子，现在只是在等这场风波过去。」

paragraphs.en: "Sony has over 120 million active PlayStation users," he continued. "Around 50 million people subscribe to PlayStation Plus. As a thought experiment, let's say 500,000 cancel in protest, that would be just 1% of that business gone — of course not enough for Sony to start rethinking. Digital is just too lucrative."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「索尼拥有超过1.2亿名PlayStation活跃用户，约有5,000万人订阅PlayStation Plus。假设有50万人为抗议而退订，那也只相当于这项业务流失1%，当然不足以让索尼重新考虑。数字业务实在太赚钱了。」

summary: 前《战神》编剧Alanah Pearce称，索尼早已预料停产PlayStation实体游戏光盘会引发强烈反弹，并为此向员工下达了「史上最严格」的社交媒体规范。分析师认为，即使大量用户抗议，也不足以让利润更高的数字业务改变方向。
opus_summary: 索尼据称早知放弃实体游戏光盘会酿成巨大公关风波，因此严格限制员工发言。超过33.5万人请愿，但数字发行带来的更高利润意味着索尼几乎不会回头。

pending_dict.reason: 词库中仅收录God of War和Laufey，正式作品名待人工核实。
暂无通行中文译名，保留英文。
